articles.title: Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams reveals first trailer and details five years after announcement - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: After years of waiting, Dragon Quest 12 has finally resurfaced. Square Enix shared an update in celebration of the series’ 40th anniversary today. Dragon Quest 12 was revealed five years ago today. However, since that initial announcement, Square Enix has bee…

articles.title: Mina the Hollower Review - Refined Throwback - Game Informer
articles.description: Mina the Hollower looks like a nostalgic throwback, and it undeniably is, but its thoughtful design and larger sensibilities make it play and feel like a contemporary video game – one that has taken the right lessons from the medium’s history.

articles.title: Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC - Gematsu
articles.description: Square Enix has announced Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC (Steam, Microsoft Store). A release date was not announced. In Japan, it…

articles.title: No Man's Sky goes to war as Swarm update brings universe-ending threat, hundred-ship space battles, and a splash of… Splatoon? - Eurogamer
articles.description: Ahead of its tenth anniversary in August, Hello Games' exploratory space sim gets its third update of the year.

articles.title: Dragon Quest 11 S coming to Nintendo Switch 2 - Nintendo Everything
articles.description: Square Enix confirmed today that Dragon Quest 11 S will be released on Nintendo Switch 2. It’s due out on September 24, 2026. If you’ve been keeping up with leaks as of late, the reveal shouldn’t come as much of a surprise. A rating classification for this ve…

articles.title: The new Razr Ultra isn’t your average phone — for better and worse - The Verge
articles.description: The 2026 Motorola Razr Ultra offers great battery life, but is dragged down by bloatware and a lackluster camera.
